response.justification: This candidate is fundamentally misaligned with the role requirements. While they are a skilled software engineer with strong communication and diverse experience, they critically lack the mandatory C++ expertise (only 6 months in 2014-2015, a decade ago) and have zero demonstrated experience in capital markets, fixed income, or financial services domains. Their career trajectory is web/backend/DevOps, not systems programming for financial services.
strengths: Demonstrated ability to master diverse technical stacks and work across complex domains
Excellent communication skills evidenced by technical talks, workshops, and open-source project leadership
Solid software engineering fundamentals including TDD, CI/CD, and DevOps practices
concerns: Critical shortfall on mandatory C++ requirement: only 6 months of experience (2014-2015) vs. required 5-10 years; experience is over a decade old
Zero evidence of capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or financial services domain knowledge
No Windows platform development mentioned; career focused on web backends, TypeScript/Node.js, and Linux-based systems
